title: lindsaeaceae
intro: The Lindsaeaceae rank refers to a family of ferns, specifically a group of flowering ferns within the division Pteridophyta. This family is characterized by its unique flowers and fronds, which are often used in the identification of its members. Lindsaeaceae is a relatively small family, consisting of approximately 40 species, and is primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plants within this family are often herbaceous and non-woody, with the ability to thrive in a variety of environments.
